entry.title: How to extract payment currency details updated for employee Bank information from SAP
entry.content:
Please suggest how to extract payment currency details updated for employee Bank information from SAP.

Currently in case of an employee Transfer or Rehire a new work agreement is created along with new SAP Personnel number and Business Partner. When banking details for the new work agreement are received they are updated against the new Business Partner created and banking data present at the Old business partner (delimited records) is overwritten (wiped out) as we are using the replication API that synchronises SAP records with external system.

There is a requirement from customer to retain/update Banking details for the Old Business Partner as well to pay out the employee expenses. For updating the employee banking information payment currency is a PERSON_NAME field that needs to be input in the API. In order to update banking details for old business partner we need to extract the Banking details from SAP and pass them in the payload.

Using the I_BusinessPartnerBank CDS we could extract Banking details of employee but payment currency was missing here. Could you please confirm how to extract the payment currency details stored for the employee banking information from SAP. Please suggest the suitable CDS Views that need to be used to extract this information from SAP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to extract payment currency details updated for e...
entry.content: please check if you can use I_WrkAssgmtPaymentTP_1 to fetch payment currency

entry.title: Re: SAP TCODES USAGE BY USERS
entry.content:
Hi,

You need to create an SQVI report for this.

Refer to this link Finding T-Codes Assigned to Users in SAP System 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hi @TomMead 

Yes, we plan to support BPC as a data source for new models. Other than for classic account models, for new models BPC will be a “standard” data source that will support all modeling functionalities like any other source.

Best,
Matthias

entry.title: Unsupported and won't be available :- No Linked Dimension is use for Blended Visualization
entry.content:
SAP have indicated that they won’t be supporting blended charts that don’t include the linked dimension.

There may be a number of situations where you don’t want to include the linked dimensions e.g. technical database key with no meaning to the user.

Is there an easy workaround to this e.g. hiding the extra field? 

Example :- 

Model blends:

  • SAC usage activities

  • SAC user details

linked on dimension user_id

 

In the classic Stories , we can just have dimensons = "Name " and the chart can be seen.

 

In the optimized mode ,

dimensions = name, user_id

User id needs to be included as the linked dimension .

 

Understand that SAP won't support but can you please help us with the work around to hide the User_id in the optimized mode or handle such scenarios.

entry.title: Master Data Governance
entry.content:
Hi,

I have completed the MDG100 and MDG200 course modules. Any advice on where to find practice quizzes or material to prepare for certification exam.
Thanks in advance, much appreciated.

SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Re: Wrong GL is debited in Landing Cost JE
entry.content: Dear Expert, As mentioned earlier, the whole batch is issued. Hence the price difference should be the same as the item cost. But it is showing a partial amount. Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for group reporting: tighter accounting integration with Group Reporting Preparation
entry.content:
Hi @Steph_Neufcourt 

I have a customer that just migrated to a version where this is available. They are looking to activate the GRPL. Currently, they experience it as a pain point that the special periods are imported in period 12. This should be solved by activating the GRPL. However, documentation advices not to perform the realignment function on mass data, to correct data, prior to the moment of activation. Would there be a way to avoid double posting of journals (s4 and GR) in the next annual close? For example, after the month end close of period 12, activate GRPL without running the re-allignment function?

Thanks already!

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

My name's Hang from Vietnam. 

I interest in participating in the digital skills initiative for my career. 

I looking forward to participating in the digital skills initiative. 

Thank you for your consideration.

entry.title: Use customer hierarchy level 3 as sold-to for output conditions
entry.content:
Hello Masters!

When configuring the output conditions for ORDRSP or INVOIC ( VV11/VV31) which are base on the sold-to/Bill-to, it is common that there will be quite a lot of sold-to/bill-to numbers to put in, especially if one has to do it for each output type. I am wondering if a higher customer number, such as customer hierarchy level 3 or level 4 could be used instead as the sold-to/s are in lower level (depending on how you see it) level 6.

entry.title: Table or CDS view for Tax Codes in S4H Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi there, I am looking for Tax (VAT or GST) specific backend CDS view in S4H Public Cloud matching below tables from SAP R3/ECC 6.0 

T007S ---> Tax Code Names

T007A ---> Tax Keys

T007C ---> Groupings for tax codes

IDCFMBRSETX_HST ---> History table for taxation

 

I remember we used to check the Tax Condition Record in KNVH and refer back to these tables with relevance to BSET Tax table from an Accounting Document view. 

 

Is there any way to obtain the corresponding CDS views for above? 

Any help is much appreciated

Regards, Sivasankaran

entry.title: Virtual element not refreshed on Save RAP SAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have implemented non-draft managed application with virtual elements. If we are opening the app first time, system is checking the virtual elements & displaying the corresponding values for the same.

However, if I will do changes on the object page for related field for which virtual elements need to be updated/determined & click on save then virtual element is not getting determined. If I will open same record from list page then on object page I am not able to see virtual element field is updated.

However, after save if we will refresh the whole page then virtual elements are getting determined as call goes to the backend. I believe on save button, virtual elements are not getting determined again as system does not recalculate the virtual elements.

Does anyone have any idea, how to recalculate/refresh the virtual elements on save.

Thanks in Advance.

Regards,

Santosh F.

 

Regards,

Santosh F.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud infrastructure is moving to SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is there any update or available information of the plan and of the status of the hana cloud migration for SAC tenant (at least a table by SAP SAC REGIONS mapping the migration status and the expected migration time by region).

Thanks in advance

MB

entry.title: Report for Creation and Change of master data History in SAP BYD
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

In the report ( Configuration Change Hisory ) : I am getting the results only which we done in the business configuration work centre ,

But we want see more Monthly wise history of master data creation details ex 😞 New Supplier creation history ( Who Created , When it created ), New Bank Creation (who created and when it created )

Please help me to resolve my requirement

Thanks and Regrards,
Krishna

entry.title: Re: GRN SCENARIO SOLUTION NEEDED
entry.content: we need to track inventory according to the Sizes but you are saying to change Item Description in GRPO and Item Code remains the same so stock will show cumulative value only in Item Master Data we can't track stock split up based on Sizes entered. We need to check and Maintain stock based on sizes without using Batch Numbers and creating separate item masters for 3 different size coconuts.

entry.title: Re: Concatenate values in Fiori elements dataField
entry.content:
You can use SAP fiori Tool and choose the Text annotation and Text Arrangement.
Or you can use FiedGroup to have more then a value in the same column.

here's the documentation 
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/d318e423c7c14c98957fe0642b6fcf49.html

hope It's helpful.

Youssef.

entry.title: Re: The current widget is already exporting, or there are...
entry.content: Hi, yes we are experiencing the same issues. Export of table does work in context menu of table, but we are having the same strange error when exporting via script in some scenarios. So far we don't have a solution for this. Best regards

Good Day

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David

I am  a 31 year old mother from a small underserved town in South Africa and I am looking to change my career,however,there aren't many job opportunities in my small town.

I am unemployed and unable to purchase exam attempts so this initiative would assist me a lot.

Thank you.

entry.title: Where can I find learning materials on RISE with SAP Methodology?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Applying the RISE with SAP Methodology learning journey

Overview
This learning journey will provide insights into the RISE with SAP Methodology, its phases, recommended tools, and their value in structuring an organization’s journey through a RISE with SAP cloud transformation.

Learning objectives

  • Explain the phases of the RISE with SAP Methodology
  • Apply the recommended tools with SAP Activate to support the RISE with SAP Methodology 
  • Visualize RISE with SAP outcomes via customer success stories 

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Not able to view PS Project from Item
entry.content: Hi, this I understood, but is it related to Web server Alias assignment?

entry.title: Regarding S/4HANA Web UI Kit
entry.content:
Earlier, your team provided with 2 libraries for UX designers to use

  1. S/4HANA Web UI Kit (Compact)
  2. S/4HANA Web UI Kit (Cozy)

Are the two libraries now merged into a single one which is called as S/4HANA Web UI Kit? In which case, are you planning to merge all the components from the above two into this one, as there are quite a lot of them which aren't available in the latter. I am assuming your team is currently merging this (in progress).

Secondly, there's also a separate section in the Fiori guidelines called as 'UI Elements - SAP Web Components'. When designing for teams using SAP Web Components - which Figma library does the UX designer refer to?

SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Where can I learn how to execute procurement processes for materials and services in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring the Basics of External Procurement in SAP S/4HANA learning journey

Overview
In this learning journey, you will gain a basic understanding of the external procurement processes in SAP S/4HANA.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, business users and consultants will be able to:

  • Execute procurement processes for materials and services
  • Create a purchase requisition and a purchase order
  • Post a goods receipt, a service entry, and an invoice
  • Automate steps of the procurement process

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: Anyone worked on the integration the reuse component in SAP Fiori element Object?
entry.content: Hello, I have achieved this using section in the fiori element [manifest] but this working on BTP cloud not on Premises. Please help if anyone faced the same issue.

entry.title: inventory counting SQL query with counted batch qty
entry.content:
Hi. I am trying to write a query for inventory counting where i want it display the counted qty per batch for batch item:

but my code here, i managed to get the counted qty from INC3 table but the data duplicated. Here is my code and the outcome:


SELECT distinct
T0.ItemCode, 
T5.ItemName, 
T0.WhsCode, 
T4.DistNumber,
--SUM(T3.OnHandQty) as 'Batch Quantity',
SUM(T2.OnHandQty) as 'Total Stock Bin',
--SUM(T0.OnHand) AS 'Total Stock Warehouse',
T1.BinCode, t1.AbsEntry as 'BinEntry', t6.Quantity as 'Batch Quantity'
 
FROM 
OITW T0
INNER JOIN OBIN T1 ON T0.WhsCode = T1.WhsCode 
INNER JOIN OIBQ T2 ON T2.WhsCode = T0.WhsCode AND T1.AbsEntry = T2.BinAbs AND T0.ItemCode = T2.ItemCode
INNER JOIN OBBQ T3 ON T3.ItemCode = T0.ItemCode AND T3.BinAbs = T1.AbsEntry AND T3.WhsCode = T2.WhsCode
INNER JOIN OBTN T4 ON T4.AbsEntry = T3.SnBMDAbs
INNER JOIN OITM T5 ON T5.ItemCode = T0.ItemCode
inner join INC3 t6 on t5.ItemCode=t6.ItemCode
WHERE 
T2.OnHandQty <> 0 and t0.WhsCode='P2' and t5.ManBtchNum='Y' and t0.ItemCode='MP0742SMN013 ' --and t4.DistNumber='309677-1' --and t1.BinCode='P2-GF1'
GROUP BY 
T0.ItemCode, T5.ItemName, T0.WhsCode, 
T0.WhsCode, T1.BinCode, T4.DistNumber, t1.AbsEntry,t6.Quantity
 
 

can someone help me? i am totally stuck.

@SonTran

entry.title: Re: Error: Failed to execute module factory for ''sap/gan...
entry.content:
Hi @Chandan 

We are very happy to welcome you to our SAP Learning Group 

This is the perfect place for you to ask questions related to our SAP Learning Journeys or to our certification published on SAP Learning and get SAP expert advice and support.

While the topic you addressed  isn't specifically covered here  and since it can hardly be answered without in-depth knowledge, I can point you to an excellent resource to help find an answer to your question.

Please access the Create an Incident Management App with SAP Fiori Elements for OData V4 site

Click the Feedback option there and choose the channel that fits best for your inquiry

In your case I recommend to post the question  in our SAP community where you can directly exchange with experienced experts with project Background -  SAP Community is a public space where anyone can start discussions and questions are answered by anyone.
 

Please always feel free to come back to our SAP Learning group to ask your questions related to our S Learning Journeys or to our certification published on SAP Learning  and collaborate with other learners to reach your learning goals and to prepare for your SAP Certification exams. However, for your particular question, I'd recommend the resource above.

I hope this helps, and best of luck!

Margit

entry.title: Re: BW Bridge : The use of ...... is not permitted
entry.content:
Update: There was a typo in the name of the function module. That's why the (misleading) error message was raised.

Summary: Using (custom) Z function modules in BW bridge is supported. And there is no need to release the function module.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi,
I am writing to you regarding the Digital skills initiative program.

I identify myself as a ‘People in remote or underserved locations that may not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts’ and I understand that this program is initiated to support my community. I have completed my learning journey in  ‘Discovering Extended Warehouse Management with SAP S/4HANA’ and would like to take the free certification attempt for – ‘SAP Certified Application Associate - Extended Warehouse Management with SAP S/4HANA’.

Below are the details of the Learning Journey.

Learning Journey: Discovering Extended Warehouse Management with SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: GRN SCENARIO SOLUTION NEEDED
entry.content:
Hello Naresh,

 

You might already assess the multiple UoM functionality. then you can maintain multiple purchase/sales UoM with different length and weight and even different price per UoM for 1 item. however, inventory UoM is always only one. so if you need to track inventory stock by different UoM and its characteristics, this approach might not be feasible. 

then I think Batch can be the only feasible solution.

 

Regards
EunSeok

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • Women 
    • People COMING FROM in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts (Colombia) 
    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location (Colombia)

I am willing to learn more about SAP and giving my best for obtaining SAP Certification.

Thank you for this opportunitty, 

Angie

entry.title: Re: RAP: Side Effect for a whole table
entry.content:
@lars_kr 

Yes, it is possible to fill associated entity (the whole table) using side effect. Sample annotations from the document is below:

<Annotations Target="STTA_SALES_ORDER_WD_20_SRV.C_STTA_SalesOrderItem_WD_20Type">
     <Annotation Term="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1.SideEffects" Qualifier="TaxAmountChanged">
          <Record>
               <PropertyValue Property="SourceProperties">
                    <Collection>
                         <PropertyPath>TaxAmount</PropertyPath>
                    </Collection>
               </PropertyValue>
               <PropertyValue Property="TargetEntities">
                    <Collection>
                         <NavigationPropertyPath>to_SalesOrder</NavigationPropertyPath>
                    </Collection>
               </PropertyValue>
          </Record>
     </Annotation>
</Annotations>

entry.title: Re: Incorrect DG Status in Sales Order
entry.content: Hi Marianne, Thank you for the reply. I checked again, and there are no sales document types excluded in the IMG table. Additionally, I am not using products from the Best Practice Content of SDS or PMA. The issue still persists despite these checks. Could there be another configuration or setting I might be missing? Best regards, Ajit

entry.title: ST_AsWKT() not working in calculation view calculated column. How can I return st_point in wkt
entry.content: I have a calculation view of type cube and want to create a calculated column representing a point from longitude and latitude. ST_POINT however is not human readable format but ST_POINT(TO_DECIMAL("LONGITUDE"),TO_DECIMAL("LATITUDE")).ST_asWKT() is returning parsing error. So is ST_AsText. What can be workaround to display ST_POINT in WKT form

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Resolving CDS view lifecycle impacts
entry.content:
Hello All,

Before we begin, I would like to quickly introduce myself. My name is Rahul Lohia and I am a Development Consultant at SAP New Zealand. I started as an ABAP developer in 2010 and now mostly focussed on S/4HANA implementations/upgrades, BTP & Fiori development. I have been part of the community for some time now but this would be my first blog post.

 

Introduction

We know that VDM (virtual data model) forms the basis for data access in SAP S/4HANA, for example, analytical applications and APIs. The VDM of SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA is represented by CDS (core data services) views. However, like any complex system, CDS views can sometimes run into dependency issues that prevent them from functioning properly during an S/4HANA upgrade cycle.

Custom CDS views are often created by businesses to meet specific requirements that are not covered by standard views. However, during an upgrade there can be multiple changes. Refer to the blog ‘Upgrade Faster – Managing app lifecycle impacts on users’ by Jocelyn Dart. Custom CDS views are just one of the many impacts that can cause disruptions to the company's operations. There's also a high probability that during an UPG phase the SUM tool might throw these errors as it would be unable to activate multiple CDS views.

This blog post will detail how you can:

  • Identify the impact.
  • Analyse errors
  • Update the objects to make them compatible with the system.
  • Activate and validate.       
  • Test and document.

1. Identify the impact of CDS view lifecycle changes

It's important to understand that deprecation is a normal part of the software cycle. This is well explained in the help page Deprecated and Decommissioned CDS views. The page also explains the recommended ways for finding the deprecated CDS views Learning About Deprecated CDS Views .

Note: As of today, running an ATC(ABAP Test Cockpit) check for the relevant S/4HANA readiness may not show all the impacted CDS views. This ATC configuration may need to be modified to collect these details.

 

2. Analyse the errors 

There are a few tools available at our disposal that can assist in analysing the CDS views. The are detailed in the note 2519431 - CDS Analysis and Repair Tools

There are also a list of bugs that may be stopping the activation. Note 2421686 - CDS view (DDL SQL View) cannot be activated with RUTDDLSACT is a good reference as well.

However, most of the analysis might have to be manually carried out. Eclipse/ADT could be quite helpful in showing the problems if multiple views are checked at the same time.

 

3. Update the CDS views 

Once you have identified the deprecated or missing CDS views, you will need to update them to follow the SAP recommendations and guidelines for replacing deprecated CDS views with the new ones.

However, there could be multiple reasons why CDS views are in error:

  • Reference standard CDS view does not exist - If the referred view has been removed in the upgraded version, this might be available in the ATC result (provided a simplification item exists). There could be multiple options:
    • If a direct replacement is recommended or found then replace the view with the successor view in your custom view.
    • If a successor view does not exist you will need to create new custom CDS views to replace them. You can use the ABAP Development Tools (ADT) or SAP HANA Studio to create new CDS views and migrate the logic from the deprecated views to the new ones.
  • Standard CDS view element/field does not exist - The element/field name might have changed in the upgraded version. Use the new element in your CDS view. If the element you want do not exist, you may need to:
    • Refer an association if the field/element was removed to another view. 
    • Create a CDS view extension to bring the element that you want to use.

        Note: Be careful when using an association/extension that you do not alter the cardinality of the core view.

  • Standard CDS view association does not exist - There may be scenarios where an existing association of a standard view may not be exposed anymore or have been removed completely. You may have to:
    • Use the new association name if it exists.
    • Add the required association directly to your custom view using the correct key fields and cardinality
  • There might be cyclical dependencies if the data model is very complex. This creates extra effort in fixing the CDS views as the individual activation of CDS view may not work. It also makes it really difficult to find a starting point in fixing the issues. You can use the ADT dependency analyzer to assist in resolving the related views. You may also want to try out commenting the cyclical associations to reduce the syntax errors and narrow the problematic view. Do not forget to uncomment once the views have been adjusted and fixed.

Note: As you work through the changes it's important to consider the stability contracts of CDS views and setting them for custom views appropriately.

 

4. Activate and validate

When all the views have been changed, you can choose the 'Activate All' feature in eclipse or use the program 'RUTDDLSACT' to activate all the CDS views at one.

There might be a bit of going back and forth to get all the views active as some of them may still require corrections. Keep repeating step 2-4 until all the views are free of errors and active. Fixing these errors might also indirectly resolve some of the custom code checks in ATC. If these CDS views are used elsewhere in your codes like in calculation views, other database views or programs, they may also need to be changed accordingly. 

 

5. Test and document 

Testing is a critical step in this process. After the changes are done, thoroughly test the CDS views to make sure they are working as expected. The business processes consuming these data models also need to be tested as a dependent GW service or SAP Fiori application may be consuming the views/elements. These errors might only show up when the processes are tested rigorously. 

Make sure the changes are well documented so that a future developer can understand them and prepare themselves for any future impacts.

 

You’ll find much more on SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA topic page

Other helpful links:

  • See all questions and answers about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA 
  • Follow SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA for more blogs and updates 
  • Ask a Question about SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Aggregate usage data in your production system with SUSG transaction
entry.content:
Hi Jens,

this options apply only to the created snapshot, not to the usage data in the system. The usage data in the system is not deleted. A snapshot is always a copy of the usage data, and in this copy the data is deleted as described in the option(s).

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Is it possible to read property value of a dimension ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to read by script in an optimized story value of a property of a dimension.

Lets say I want to read property "Validity date" of a cost center selected (dimension).

I am not using planning model it is a report.

thanks in advance

Mat

entry.title: Production order confirmation via custom design
entry.content:
Hello,

We have custom program for Production orders confirmation. It uses BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT.
I think there is some known issue, when sometimes entries are stuck in CO1P due to posting in update mode. As advised, to avoid CO1P entries BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE can be used.
But unfortunately for us it is not an option.

>> The process we have:
1. Users confirm Production orders through custom tool
2. Background job for CORUPROC is run every 5 minutes

>> The problems we have:
1. Sometimes during confirmation users ignore the fact that Goods receipt did not happen. They see that nothing happened and post it one more time. Later CO1P is processed and we have situation, that Goods receipt were duplicated.
2. Sometimes when user is working with particular Production order and at the same time the job CORUPROC is processed using the same order. It leads to receiving entry in CO16N with error "User locks the order" which can be processed only manually.

>> So the question is how it is better to avoid the issues? If we can not re-design the program, probably we can add check giving to user the restricting message.
1. I'm not sure in which moment entries go to CO1P. Is it possible during confirmation to catch it and show to user the message, kind of: "Goods receipt is stuck in CO1P..." ?
2. If point 1 is possible, is it possible to distinguish CO1P entry from entries COGI and CO16N?
3. If it is not possible to catch CO1P entry during confirmation. Probably after confirmation, wait a few seconds and then check AFFW table and give the message if entries are found? But how to distinguish CO1P entry from entries COGI and CO16N?
4. Any other options or hints? Maybe I need to think in other direction.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Styling and Customization in SAP ABAP ALV using CL_SALV_TABLE
entry.content: Wonderful information @harsh_raj1.

entry.title: Where can I find learning material forSAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering Event-Driven Integration with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh learning journey

Overview
This learning journey introduces you to SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh which is an offering that complements SAP Event Mesh for more demanding scenarios. As part of SAP’s event-driven ecosystem, it is a fully managed event streaming and event management service that enables enterprise-grade event-driven architecture.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you will be able to understand the concept of an event-driven architecture, its benefits and components, such as different event types and formats. In your role as a developer, you will also get insights into the capabilities, tools and benefits of SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, and will explore the differences and commonalities to SAP Event Mesh.

Prerequisites

  • Discovering SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Developing with SAP Integration Suite

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect DG Status in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi Ajit,

I have unfortunately no further idea what could be missing/wrong, because this status in the Sales Order you should only get for Products which are classified as "No Dangerous Goods" or for Products which are set in the Product Master to "Compliance Relevant" = "No".

I would suggest you set up a ticket, so that the support can look on your system.

Best Regards,
Marianne

entry.title: Re: Created a program to fetch customer details from AS400 system to SAP S4HANA via RFC FM
entry.content: Super Informative @harsh_raj1

entry.title: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI window completely
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to capture SAP GUI screen through build process automation, but it is not loading complete screen.

Please suggest how we can capture screen completely.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect DG Status in Sales Order
entry.content: Hi Marianne, Thank you for your assistance. I will set up a support ticket as you suggested so that the support team can investigate the issue further. Thank you for your help. Best regards, Ajit

entry.title: SAP CPQ - Post Actions not executed
entry.content: Hey! I have SAP CPQ instance with a lot of Post-Actions after approving a Quote. I noticed that for one quote approval there was an error in a script which resulted in transaction being rolled back. Then, a user approved a quote again and it succeeded, but no Post Actions were executed. Is it some known behavior? Sometimes it seems like Post Actions were not executed even without any previous exception

entry.title: Re: Frequently Asked Questions – Purchase Requisitions (Update 07)
entry.content:
Hello,

        We are facing an issue in Update of multiple lines of a PR scenario wherein the update of only 1st line item of a PR is happening and the second line onwards its failing. How to update multiple line items of a PR via the standard API, when we are trying to update ex: the line item 20 of a PR, getting error "user XXx cloud connector error, SBP already processing the purchase requisition XXXX, and the update is not being performed via the AIS (Azure integration service).

 

Thanks & Regards

Venu

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content: When I use ODBC or OLE DB connection, connection is the same, slow. It connects about 8 minutes. It is only occurs Oracle 19c Database.

entry.title: Re: SAP Code Vulnerability Analyzer (CVA) - FAQs
entry.content:
Hello Sergio,

The on-premise version of CVA requires a user-based license which is the one you quote. That material number should not be deprecated.

However, there is a Cloud version which does NOT require a license. You only need "BTP ABAP Environment" for the Cloud version.
https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/abap-environment?region=all&tab=service_plan&licenseModel=free

Best regards
Peter

entry.title: Re: Setting permissions for all dimension members using D...
entry.content:
Finally the only solution I found was to create a single hierarchy where I grouped everything in the same concept and to the main element of the hierarchy I gave permissions to those users. That way I didn't have to duplicate all the users for each element.

Maybe there is a better solution, but that gives me the result I needed.

entry.title: Re: Customer / Supplier Business Partner Master Data: Authorization Groups
entry.content:
Maintain authorization groups (ID 102740)

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3280297

The SSCUI 102740 - "Maintain authorization groups" is not available for the cloud customer for use

On my Partner Demo System i cannot edit BP Clasiffication for Poland. Anyone can help. 102740 apps is not available on S4H Public Cloud.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content: I installed Oracle Client on my machine. There is ODE.NET and ODP.NET folders. Is standart Oracle client DLL is in there? Under ODP.NET folder, there is Oracle.DataAccess.dll file with version number 4.122.19.1

entry.title: Re: Customer 360 is Pervasive Analytics Or Advanced Dashb...
entry.content:
Hello,

it's an advanced dashboard. it consists of multiple tabs.

 

Regards
EunSeok

entry.title: Re: RAP: Side Effect for a whole table
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. But the annotation in the XML doesn't help me much right now. I rather need ABAP code. So the specification in the behavior definition and how I then update it with EML.

entry.title: New CIO Guide: Identity Lifecycle in SAP Landscapes
entry.content:
We just published our new, comprehensive CIO Guide: Identity Lifecycle in SAP Landscapes!

This new CIO guide explores the SAP approach to identity and access management (IAM) in the context of the identity lifecycle. It explains how IAM software from SAP supports building successful system integrations in cloud and hybrid environments and includes diagrams and a reference architecture to illustrate the concepts. With SAP Cloud Identity Services and well-established IAM-related industry standards, SAP improves system integration and helps provide a seamless user experience while also improving security and compliance.

The first version of this CIO guide was released in 2018 and quickly became one of the most popular documents in the SAP security community. Despite an update of the guide in 2021, a lot has changed again since then, so we decided to issue another update that builds on the proven format while adding new technical developments and strategic recommendations.

The most important change is that we have brought the capabilities of authentication, authorization, and provisioning together into one seamless solution, SAP Cloud Identity Services. At the same time, the Identity Directory service has assumed a much more prominent role as the backbone of IAM tools and processes.

The new guide explains the identity lifecycle and the SAP Cloud Identity Services strategy and explores the SAP offerings for each area. We also introduce a section on the reference architectures for IAM to provide you with an overview and comprehensive technical diagrams for the major IAM areas of authentication, identity lifecycle, and authorization.

Read the new CIO guide!

 

For more information about SAP Cloud Identity Services and to stay up to date on the latest developments, visit our topic page in SAP Community:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/cloud-identity-services

entry.title: Created new plant but while posting invoice, getting error as profit center is not filled
entry.content:
created new plant for Telangana. Performing testing with STO PO.

Sending material from Maharashtra plant to Telangana Plant but only for this case error is coming as balancing field profit center is missing from line item 0001, while Posting invoice using J_1IG_INV.

For other plants (for example MH to GJ ) all is working fine.

any idea , what could be missing.. Checked all configuration and everything looks okay

entry.title: Re: SAP Marketing Cloud email campaign email opened but n...
entry.content:
Hi Felix,

I have to warn you that the open email metrics  and event is not on that I would recommend. Why do you want to use this event? The open event is flaky as not ALL email clients send this event. Note also that an open event will be issued by SAP Marketing Cloud for each click-through that is received.

For more information on the triggers, see Types of Triggers | SAP Help Portal.

If you want to use the open email, then use the trigger open email, not the click-through. Regarding your question "Does the click through action, with the No branch, imply that the customer opened the email but did not click any links?" The no branch with the click-through only means that the link was no click, it cannot imply that the email was open or not.

Best Regards, Isabelle

It is best to use a click-through event. Why are you not using the click-through event? Is it because you are impacted by bot clicks?

We plan to deliver the bot click filtering feature in the 2408 release. I invited you to join the SAP Marketing Cloud What's New WebCast that is planned to be held on Thursday July 11th at 4pm CEST where the feature will be presented.

Best Regards, Isabelle

entry.title: Re: Rectangular data matrix in Adobe livecycle designer
entry.content:
Hello,

we solved our problem by generating the data matrix as bitmap.

In FM that is printing the form we render a bitmap for a data matrix using class cl_rstx_barcode_renderer which has a lot of useful static methods for rendering bar codes, QR codes, data matrixes... 

We then send this bitmap to the form and display it as image.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am Bora from Turkey.

Glad to have joined the community! Looking forward to contribute.

entry.title: Re: Creating Allowances from a Template
entry.content:
Hi,

did you include a charge for the usage in the rate plan? You need to define a charge for RE_PREPAID in the rate plan template (and rate plan) in order to get the usage deducted.

Best regards,

Annette

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Customer Project Billing Item Detail chang...
entry.content:
Hi Ryan, Thanks for the question.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, tracking changes to billing items within a customer project involves utilizing the Audit Log functionality. While the level of detail logged and the direct access to billing item change logs may vary based on the specific edition and customizations.  

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/55a7cb346519450cb9e6d21c1ecd6ec1/7eed4aba8bcb4d7091e289cf0dc00cf4.html?q=Audit%20Log

If you want to check specific changes through Display Change Documents in the Customer Project, You might have to submit a improvement request - https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/930 

Best Regards

Dave

entry.title: Re: cXML type system in TPM Configurations
entry.content:
Hello @aditya_20 ,

Yes, you can select cXML instead of GS1 XML in the Trading Partner Management (TPM) in SAP Cloud Integration. When configuring identifiers or creating Type Systems:

  1. Go to TPM.
  2. Add or edit a Type System.
  3. In the configuration options, you should see a dropdown to select the standard (e.g., cXML, GS1 XML).
  4. Choose cXML if it is supported in your environment.

Best Regards,

Burak

entry.title: Re: Configure Your Business Processes: An Introduction to SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Hello Aroumeliotis,

Thanks for your question! If I've understood correctly, you're referring to the "CBC source system" configuration in the Identity Provisioning service (IPS). I'm afraid that it's not possible to make the password visible. Also, please note that it's strongly advised not to change any of these configurations in IPS. Hope that helps.

Best regards,
Fabian

entry.title: Re: Export to Excel SAC Application Designer function
entry.content: hi, i created an image and i want to add the export report functionality but it's missing from my availble functions

entry.title: missing SAC optimized story functions
entry.content:
I'm using Optimized Story Experience API Reference Guide to enhance my stories and I encounter lots of missing functions.

for example, I'm missing the export function 

I'm missing all of the functions in this link and more

Optimized Story Experience API Reference Guide Version 2023.8 (sap.com)

entry.title: Re: Configure Your Business Processes: An Introduction to SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Hello Fabian,

Yes indeed you understood correctly. Can i somehow change the password and if yes what the new password need to contain. I need this because i want to add to the source system properties the OAuth2TokenServiceURL and when i add this the previous password disappearing and it ask me for a new one. 

Best regards,
Andreas

entry.title: SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter June 2024
entry.content:
Dear customers,
Find here an overview of the SAP Enterprise Support Academy monthly newsletter on latest news, training courses, upcoming sessions, and further educational offerings.
The SAP Enterprise Support Academy provides expert guidance and high impact knowledge transfer services that enable you to innovate and be successful with your SAP solutions.

Subscribe to regularly receive latest news and stay informed about the wide range of educational offerings provided by the SAP Enterprise Support Academy that help you to build the digital skills tailored to your needs.

Preview available live sessions on SAP Support Portal, tailored per region:
APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America*

Please note: A one-time registration for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support [accessible here] is necessary to register for these events.

SAP Datasphere Connectivity Series

Good news! We’ve updated this series of E-Learnings on SAP Datasphere Connectivity with new assets on integration with Amazon S3 and Google BigQuery. Make deploying and integrating SAP Datasphere easier by completing these quick hit learnings!
Check out here: SAP Datasphere Connectivity Series

New! Discovery Center Mission for SAP Build Process Automation

Register for the first Discovery Center mission for SAP Enterprise Support for BTP. The mission helps you to get ramped-up and easily get started with SAP Build Process Automation.
Gain an overview and get started

New Dates in June: SAP Analytics Cloud EGI

Check out our recently refreshed content for the two virtual workshops on SAP Analytics Cloud BI and planning fundamentals. The sessions are multihour virtual sessions, delivered over 3-5 working days to you at no additional cost.
Save your seat and register through the blog post

All You Need to Know About SAP Cloud ALM

Join the EGI workshop and learn all about the benefits and capabilities of SAP Cloud ALM and to help you use its functionalities in your own environment. It combines Implementation, Operations, and Service topics to allow you to leverage the full potential of SAP Cloud ALM.

We have three sessions scheduled in June. Register here

Get Ready with SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA

Learn all about the SAP Readiness Check tool for SAP S/4HANA, and how it supports a successful conversion to SAP S/4HANA. We offer short and interactive live must-know sessions in multiple languages to get you prepared to start your SAP S/4HANA project.

Register here: SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA

Release Navigator for SAP Customer Experience: Q2 Update Available Now

We are excited to share that the Q2 updates to the release navigator for SAP Customer Experience had been automatically implemented, and include the most recent release enhancement, and information about future releases.

Access here

Unleashing the Power of Artificial Intelligence in Customer Support from SAP

Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized the way businesses operate, opening doors to unprecedented opportunities for innovation and efficiency. Within the realm of customer support at SAP, these cutting-edge technologies play a crucial role in enhancing the customer experience and streamlining support processes.

Read more

SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network Seamlessly Integrated into SAP for Me

SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network are live on SAP for Me! The customer portal is your new central entry point to support, simplifying support-related tasks by using a set of digital self-service features to easily request support and resolve issues. SAP for Me is made for you!

Read more

Your Ultimate Guide for SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando!

Gain valuable insights into innovative technologies and strategies that are shaping the future of customer support and business transformation. Mark your calendars for these must-attend sessions! See you soon at this year´s SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando from June 3-5.

Check it out!

Enhancing Support Experiences with Support Accreditation

Learn how Support Accreditation enhances the support experience for partners and customers. Get valuable insights on efficient problem resolution and how to interact with support teams for optimal results. The training incorporates the latest in AI and machine learning to prepare you for the future of support services. Don't miss out on leveraging these benefits and optimizing your service experience with SAP!

Read more in the interview

Success Story: LG Group

The LG Group is thankful to the SAP Mission Control Center team for their dedication and teamwork, which ensured the success of a critical event for LG. They appreciate the MCC team's support and look forward to continued collaboration for LG's future success.

Link: sap.to/61101XbYkP

 

  • Guidance on signing up
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Video
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy at a glance
  • Direct access to SAP Learning Hub (Login with your s-user ID and password)
  • SAP ES Academy Entitlement document
  • FAQ
  • SAP Enterprise Support value maps
  • SAP Support Portal
  • Basics: Sign up | Time zone setup |
  • Formats: EGI | MTE | AIE | Program
  • Search: Language | Keyword | Filter | Calendar
  • Upcoming live sessions in your region: APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America

Best Regards,
Marianne Sigmund

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

We have an Istanbul group if you're interested to join?

entry.title: Public cloud - embedded EWM - automatic synchronous goods receipt production WITH automatic packing
entry.content:
Dear community,

Within the synchronous goods receipt process, is it possible to combine following features in 1 process:

  • PP: automatic goods receipt (GR automatically triggered based on confirmation CO11N)
  • PP-EWM: synchronous goods receipt
  • EWM: automatic packing via packing instructions

I have tried all determination records (0GRP, 0RCV, STOC, SHIP, ...) trying to achieve this, but without any success. It's only possible when I deactivate the automatic goods receipt process and perform it manually via MIGO. Then it works. But I would like it to be automated during production order confirmation.

Many thanks for any feedback

Kind regards,

Jens Koyen

entry.title: Re: Introducing – BPC Embedded Access Rights
entry.content:
Hi Pravin,

We have a hybrid solution with BW4/HANA (on prem.) and BPC Add-On with Live connection to SAC. Now every user in SAC, has a corresponding user in BW / BPC. What is the license type of the users in the On-Premise system, the one you put in SU01?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: Thanks for sharing @atsuko_eguchi - it's good to have your experience here in SAP Community!

entry.title: Integration of change documents in M2S in Siganvio
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I was just wondering whether there is also a transformation script for the M2S process in Signavio in which the change documents are considered. In the O2C or P2P Processes they are considered.
As far as I have understood correctly, the changes for production in the SAP system are not necessarily written and you might have to activate something so that you can track this. Or are there other ways of integrating production unit changes into Signavio?

Greetings Niels

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: SVT - Issues with...
entry.content:
Dear Paulo,

Thanks a lot for your interest in our new Substance Volume Tracking solution in SAP S/4HANA for product compliance and for your detailed description below.

Substance Volume Tracking  in SAP S/4HANA for product compliance is still under development and will be continuously enhanced in the future. Currently the main focus in our Customer Engagement Sessions for SVT is on the evaluation of the SVT specific requirements for regulations like EU REACH, UK REACH, Turkey KKDIK, US TSCA, US TSCA SNUR, JP ISHL, JP CSCL and so on. 

The focus of the first version of the new Substance Volume Tracking solution, which you will find in the current SAP S/4HANA OnPremise, Private Cloud and Public Cloud releases, is on the following topics:

  • Implementation of a new architecture concept for SVT which is flexible enough to support various SVT relevant regulations and various SVT relevant business processes
  • Integration of SVT with the new Product Compliance Event and Task processing framework
  • Integration of SVT with the new Compliance Requirement concept in Product Compliance
  • Integration of SVT with the new Data Model in Product Compliance
  • Implementation of a new concept for retracking of substance volumes based on SVT relevant changes in e.g. compositions, compliance assessments, compliance requirement versions, legal entity mappings, ...
  • Introduction of a new concept for defining and mapping of Legal Entities which supports different Legal Entity definitions in different regulations (e.g. business place vs site vs plant vs company ...)
  • Providing an enhanced traceability of the tracked substance volumes by e.g. enabling a drill-down possibility in the SVT Monitor from the tracked substance volumes to the corresponding material documents
  • Implementation of a new concept for tracking produced substance volumes
  • ... and many more features (please see the SAP S/4HANA SVT online help for details: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6540a57e42314b5a8c208bca283e29e6/d8b79377f49a4d29a7003af45fd944d2.html?locale=en-US)

Important areas where we still have gaps or which are not supported in the current version of the solution are:

  • Support of specific business processes like Vendor Consignment, Subcontracting, Vendor Returns, Customer Consignment, Advanced Intercompany Sales, Third Party Sales Customer Returns, Re-import or Process/Production Orders with Rework
  • Support of specific regulatory requirements like e.g. certain exemption scenarios, only representative functionality, maintenance and consideration of substance registrations and notifications, tracking/aggregation of use specific substance volumes 
  • Tracking of planned quantities and the direct integration into the logistic/material management processes (which would also be the pre-requisite for blocking business process in cases where a threshold limit would be exceeded)

Based on these gaps we decided for the time being that we do not allow to enable customer specific compliance requirement definitions for SVT. 

Compliance Requirement versions which are already enabled for Substance Volume Tracking are:

  • EU REACH Registrations Status
  • GB REACH Registrations Status
  • TR KKDIK Registration Status
  • US TSCA Inventory Status
  • US TSCA SNUR Status
  • US TSCA CDR Status
  • JP ISHA Status
  • JP ENCS Status
  • JP CSCL PACS Status
  • JP CSCL General Chemicals

When testing SVT with these Compliance Requirements, please consider the description of the Compliance Requirement Versions, the SAP S/4HANA Help for SVT (see link above) and the gaps which are mentioned above.

In addition all Compliance Requirements which are part of our Best Practice Content for Substance Volume Tracking (Scope Item 4OL) are SVT enabled. See: ".. SVT 2020 June - Best Practice Content (Initial Version)" in the Manage Compliance Requirements - Product Marketability app. 
These Compliance Requirement Version definitions were created to allow customers to perform the test which are described in the Test Script of the 4OL Scope Item in all countries which are supported by the Best Practice Content.

By using the "Create New Version" functionality in the Manage Compliance Requirements (Product Marketability) app you can create your own versions of these Best Practice Compliance Requirements and enhance these versions with your own substance list definitions.

Create New Version based on existing version:

 

Edit and Release new Version:

Once you released and activated (App Activate Compliance Requirements - Product Marketability) such a new version of a Compliance Requirement Definition it will show up in the Enable Substance Volume Tracking - for Compliance Requirements app and can be used for own SVT tests. Again, please consider the SAP S/4HANA Help for SVT and the gaps which are mentioned above while testing.

The two new apps Manage Legal Entities and Manage Legal Entity Mappings are not only used for Substance Volume Tracking, but also for defining and determining the company specific part of the Korean SDS number (see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6540a57e42314b5a8c208bca283e29e6/d5e23fccc7be47f9a1df284b0a75508d.html?locale=en-US for details). The business process scenario SELL IN is currently only supported for the SDS use case not not for SVT. I will discuss with my colleagues if we can find a way to better separate from a UI point of view better the two different use cases (SVT and SDS) in the app.

For the issue which you described at the end of your post when you tried to save the newly created Legal Entity mapping, please open a SAP message so that we can take a closer look at this problem.

I hope this helps.

Best regards,
Michael Schalk (SAP)
Product Manager for Substance Volume Tracking

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @atsuko_eguchi - which part of Germany? The reason I ask is that we have a few location groups for Germany, maybe there is one you would like to join ...

Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm Quan from Vietnam. I identify as a person in the following categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • First generation college students
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

Starting with an accounting background and a few years of experience working with SAP, I want to study for a SAP Certification to process further in my SAP career.

Thanks for your consideration.

Quan.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud – Monitoring All Model Import/Export Jobs
entry.content:
Hello Mohamed,

I wanted to know what's the time zone of the data coming in from Timestamp dimension from SAP__SAC_USAGE_ACTIVITIES model.

Could you please guide?

Thanks and Regards,

Sumit Lahare

entry.title: Multiple Value Help Fragments in SAP BTP Fiori apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a main XML view file that describes a table with colums and filters.
It uses smarttable and smartfilterbar.
The table gets data from a connected service of an external system.
The table has 5 filters and each filter is also based on one field in the fields the service opens.
Each filter also have a value help window where the user sees all the values of this field coming from the external source.
The user can then pick one value which then gets assigned as the actual filter value and is used to filter the table.
example:
There is an account ID filter.
when pressed the Account ID's value help opens where a user can pick a value that is then assigned as the Account ID filter value.


Each fragment's code looks roughly like this:

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
    <SelectDialog
        id="selectDialog"
        title="Account ID's"
        items="{/AccountCollection}"
        search=".onValueHelpSearch"
        confirm=".onValueHelpClose"
        cancel=".onValueHelpClose">
        <StandardListItem id="_IDGenStandardListItem1"
            title="{InternalID}"
            description="{BusinessPartnerName}"/>
    </SelectDialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Each fragment uses several functions(like search=".onValueHelpSearch", confirm=".onValueHelpClose", cancel=".onValueHelpClose">) I need to write the code for in the controller.
When there are several fragments like that, the code becomes long and either has a lot of redundancy or becomes complex in managing the assignmnts of the different values of the different fragments to the fields and the actual filtration of the table.

I was wondering if there is some more straightforward way to achieve value help for multiple filters without having to write several functions per fragment or having complex central functions to handle all the fragments at once
.
I tried using an annotations file but there are issues there as well because the service im getting data from is odata 2.0 and not 4.0.

entry.title: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content:
Hello, i have the requirement to change the counted Result of a Physical Inventory, like you do in the Transaction LI12N.

I have already found a function module to enter count results -> L_INV_COUNT_EXT
But if i try to overwrite the Position i get the exception NO_COUNT_ALLOWED.
Has anyone a idea how to do this?

Kind Regards Niklas

entry.title: Re: Authorization roles for Inbound IDOC processing from...
entry.content:
Hi,

Did you got the solution ?

entry.title: Merge almost identical process variants in Process Conformance
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I like to use the process conformance widgets in my investigation to make the traget/ actual comparison between the processes.
I have the question whether it is possible to merge almost identical process variants. I am thinking of when a certain event is executed 2 times and in a other variant 3 times and the other process is the same.

Is it possible to merge these variants, because there are always many different variants if just an event occurs several times.

Greetings Niels

entry.title: Re: Change documents for standard networks (CN01/02) aren...
entry.content:
Hi Andreas...

In the "Define parameters for standard network" IMG activity, under "Structures > Templates > Standard Network" the "creation of change documents active" indicator in the standard network profile must be checked.

Regards

Marcio Blos

entry.title: abap2UI5 - Host your Apps on SAP Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Running abap2UI5 in an on-premise system and want to host your apps on the SAP Fiori Launchpad? This post briefly shows how to set up your ABAP system and launchpad for this scenario.

Connector for SAP Fiori Launchpad

Besides abap2UI5, which should already be on your system, we will install the project abap2UI5 - Connector SAP Fiori Launchpad (On-Stack) with abapGit and configure launchpad tiles for abap2UI5 apps:

abap2UI5 Apps hosted on SAP Fiori Launchpad

The connector works as follows:

 abap2UI5 running with the Connector for SAP Fiori Launchpad (On-Stack)

abap2UI5 is now also on LinkedIn. To generate some traffic for the page, you can find the full blog post there. I would appreciate your follow on LinkedIn.

LinkedIn

Yes, we are all there!

Follow us on LinkedIn.

entry.title: How to define user authorization for SAC with Public Cloud in Cloud Identity Services?
entry.content:
Hello everyone

We have a SAC system connected to the Public Cloud. In Cloud Identity Services, the user role is Constant and Embedded BI Admin is given. In other words, everyone who has a user in the Public Cloud also has a user in the SAC, and all users have Admin authority.

However, instead, only some users should be defined as SAC users and only a few of these users should be given Admin authority. Is there any way to achieve this?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: sp_spaceused on mon tables
entry.content:
Monitoring (MDA) tables aren't real tables; they are special proxy tables that reference internal ASE counters and memory structures.

From Performance & Tuning Series: Monitoring Tables:

The data in the monitoring tables is not stored on disk. The data is calculated when you execute a query on one of the monitoring tables. Table definitions are contained in proxy table definitions that are created by a server installation script, which can be run manually automatically during server installation. These proxy tables use an interface to the SAP ASE to collect monitoring data when you perform a query.

entry.title: Re: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content: It throws that exception when a row for LINV has ISTAT <> 'N', but aside from that I'm not sure why you would have a requirement to change the result... the count result should simply be the result.

entry.title: BO 4.3 Cloud - No such file or directory
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

When scheduling a Webi report with Excel output to save in a folder on the server, the error sometimes occurs:

[No such file or directory]: [CrystalEnterprise.DiskUnmanaged] , occurs from time to time, and sometimes saving to the folder works.

Has anyone experienced this in BO 4.3 Cloud?

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am an SAP student and my interest in SAP started last year when I started my learning journey with SAP. My background is in finance and accounting where I have over 15 years experience working in finance roles. I have sought to expand my knowledge about SAP products and roles for an SAP consultant in the field, and I feel that the digital skills programme would allow me to do this. I am looking to upskill as part of my SAP journey to change my career from finance into tech and to secure a role in the tech industry as an end goal. I only heard about the digital skills programme a couple of weeks ago and I want to send my appreciation to David for putting this together and for making it easier for individuals that wish to pursue a career in SAP. Thanks!

Regards

Stuart

entry.title: Re: Build SSAM 2405 failed - Missing extension SAMFoundation
entry.content: Hi Bill and Muhammad, thanks, I've raised an incident and they replied with this new version. extension-SAMFoundation was missing in extensions folder downloaded from MDK Plugin

entry.title: cl_cds_test_environment for nested CDS views
entry.content:
i try to mock I_BillingDocument for tests,
but this works only for selects on I_BillingDocumentBasic and not at the root.

Can anyone tell me how to make select work based on I_BillingDocument? We are on HANA 2021.

 go_cds = cl_cds_test_environment=>create(  i_for_entity      = 'I_BillingDocument' "
                                                I_select_base_dependencies = abap_true ) .
     go_cds->enable_double_redirection( ).
    
     " mock data
     DATA: vbrk_t       TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF vbrk WITH EMPTY KEY.
     vbrk_t = VALUE #( ( vbeln = '1234567890'  ) ).
     go_cds->insert_test_data(  vbrk_t  ).
    
    
     " select - dosen't work
     SELECT billingdocument
        FROM I_BillingDocument
        INTO TABLE @DATA(itest1) UP TO 10 ROWS.
    
     " works
     SELECT billingdocument
        FROM I_BillingDocumentBasic
        INTO TABLE @DATA(itest2) UP TO 10 ROWS.

entry.title: Re: Send discount price ( SD price ) to third party system
entry.content: You can use COND_A for pricing condition records

entry.title: Re: How to kick start with SAP Standard Content for Billing and Revenue Innovation Management?
entry.content:
Hi Regina! Kudos on this blog post!

I am also interested in more information about BRIM, like Best Practices and more informational material, where can I get this?

 

Regards,

Leandro

entry.title: Re: how to control variable offset range [Analysis for Mi...
entry.content:
Hello @hajime78,
what you try to achieve seems to be similar to what in SAP BW can be achieved via "current member" variable:

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/d4/85021f664f4c118559db60f2ebc016/frameset.htm

I am no real SAP ABAP/SQL developer but I guess it will be quite difficult to achieve the same...

If you are a real developer then maybe you can solve this via a window function... but I cannot explain you how to do this in detail 😪

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Build SSAM 2405 failed - Missing extension SAMFoundation
entry.content: Download the latest plugin and it should contains SAMFoundation

entry.title: how to use discover api - cloud integration
entry.content:
hi,

I need to use an API present in the "discover api":

what are the steps to use it?

I made a copy of the api and created the proxies api

thanks

entry.title: Trigger an Emarsys Email Campaign via API using Postman/Bruno
entry.content:
In SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement you can send emails or trigger automation programs using an external event. That external event needs to be created via API since there is no standard functionality for an end user to trigger such an event.

In the Emarsys help there is also one page which describes the process: Bypassing opt-in status for triggered emails by API. In that page the API call is explained by using an API demo page in the last chapter. In this article I describe how to achieve the same by using an API client like Postman or Bruno. Nevertheless, please follow the guide above for the first 3 chapters before you continue to read further.

 

API Endpoint to Trigger an External Event

The API endpoint as described in the developer portal is: 

https://api.emarsys.net/api/v2/event/{eventId}/trigger 

Where {eventId} is the id of the event you created before. The body payload you need for this use case would look like this:

 

{
  "key_id": "3",
  "external_id": "",
  "data": null,
  "contacts": [
    {"external_id": "contact1@email.com"},
    {"external_id": "contact2@email.com"}
  ]
}

 

The field key_id '3' specifies that you will give email addresses in the 'contacts' section where you need to specify all the email addresses of the contacts you want to send the email to.

 

Example with Postman

Postman is a tool to set up and run API calls (Download). It has a free option but requires you to create an account. If you look for an entire local setup please read further down on Bruno. At the end of this article you find a JSON code which you can import into Postman as a new collection. After doing so you will need to expand the collection and open the single item 'Trigger External Event'.

First you need to adjust the script in tab 'Pre-Request Script' and exchange the string '<API User>' with your API user and the string '<Secret>' with your API secret (Keep the double quotes around!):

Furthermore you need to exchange the string '<EventID>' with the ID of the external event you created before. Then you need to adjust the email addresses in the tab 'Body' with your own data:

 Finally you just need to press on 'Send' and the external event should be triggered for all the contacts you provided.

 

Example with Bruno

Bruno is another API client which is free and runs completely locally (Download). You can use the same JSON file as explained in the Postman chapter:

After importing the collection you need to expand the collection and select the item 'Trigger External Event'. Then you have to adjust the script in tab 'Script' and exchange the string '<API User>' with your API user and the string '<Secret>' with your API secret (Keep the double quotes around!):

Furthermore you need to exchange the string '<EventID>' with the ID of the external event you created before. Then you need to adjust the email addresses in the tab 'Body' with your own data:

Finally you need to save and run and the external event should be triggered for all the contacts you provided.:

 

JSON Collection for Import

In the box below you find a Postman collection which you can copy and store as a JSON file (file extension .json). This can also be used as a collection import into Bruno. Please note that this is just an example code and comes with no warranty and no support!

 

{
	"info": {
		"name": "Trigger_Event",
		"schema": "https://schema.getpostman.com/json/collection/v2.1.0/collection.json"
	},
	"item": [
		{
			"name": "Trigger External Event",
			"event": [
				{
					"listen": "prerequest",
					"script": {
						"exec": [
							"const crypto_js = require('crypto-js');",
							"var ts = (new Date()).toISOString();",
							"var nonce = crypto_js.lib.WordArray.random(16).toString(crypto_js.enc.Hex);",
							"var digest = crypto_js.enc.Base64.stringify(crypto_js.enc.Utf8.parse(crypto_js.SHA1(nonce + ts + \"<Secret>\").toString(crypto_js.enc.Hex)));",
							"pm.environment.set(\"wsse-header\",'UsernameToken Username=\"' + \"<API User>\" + '\", PasswordDigest=\"' + digest + '\", Created=\"' + ts + '\", nonce=\"' + nonce + '\"');"
						],
						"type": "text/javascript",
						"packages": {}
					}
				}
			],
			"request": {
				"method": "POST",
				"header": [
					{
						"key": "X-WSSE",
						"value": "{{wsse-header}}",
						"type": "text"
					}
				],
				"body": {
					"mode": "raw",
					"raw": "{\n  \"key_id\": \"3\",\n  \"external_id\": \"\",\n  \"data\": null,\n  \"contacts\": [\n    {\"external_id\": \"contact1@email.com\"},\n    {\"external_id\": \"contact2@email.com\"},\n    {\"external_id\": \"contact3@email.com\"}\n  ]\n}",
					"options": {
						"raw": {
							"language": "json"
						}
					}
				},
				"url": {
					"raw": "https://api.emarsys.net/api/v2/event/<EventID>/trigger",
					"protocol": "https",
					"host": [
						"api",
						"emarsys",
						"net"
					],
					"path": [
						"api",
						"v2",
						"event",
						"<EventID>",
						"trigger"
					]
				}
			},
			"response": []
		}
	]
}

 

 

Further Information

There is also a Github page 'Emarsys Postman Collection' which contains a complete collection of most of the Emarsys APIs to import into Postman or Bruno. It also comes with a nice documentation and works with environment setups for better security regarding the credential handling.

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hi @DoloresCorrea ,

thank you very much for the very informative blog!

We tried to do the same thing as you did and all seems to work as on your screenshots (huray! :)), but we are having issues with the Roles and Authorizations.

We tried to seperate the Roles between 4 different people (1st person creates a change request, 2nd person can approve it, 3rd tests and 4th deployes it), but this did not seem to work. As soon as a person is a Project member, that person can do everything, independant of the role, which was assigned to him

Do you have any ideas what could be wrong, are we missing something?
Thank you!

Best regards,
Goran

entry.title: Re: How to get geolocation data through CDS view?
entry.content:
Hello @ventior,

I'm not sure if you can achive this via a CDS view... at least the SAP Help page describes how to achieve this via a HANA Calculation view: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/f7f432923cd9495bb5c98d5cdd667663.html 

Hope this helps anyway... or you find some more hints on these pages.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content: It should be possible, as it can happen that the user has miscounted or something similar. The function should be able to do the same as when you initiate a recount using transaction LI04 or adjust the result using LI12N

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Wroclaw 2024 - Call for papers
entry.content:
I have just submitted two presentation proposals

  • EWM-MFS demystified
  • Integrated logistics planning in SAP standard - implementation challenges and S/4HANA pitfalls

See you there in Wrocław!
